name: The People Vs OJ
overview:
This critically acclaimed 2016 miniseries dramatizes the real-life trial of O. J. Simpson, who was accused of murdering his ex-wife Nicole Brown Simpson and her friend Ron Goldman in 1994.

Rather than just focusing on the crime, the show explores:

The legal battle between prosecution and defense

The media frenzy that turned the case into a spectacle

Issues of race, fame, and justice in America
